              TAMIL  NADU  GOVERNMENT  GAZETTE            [Part  VI—Sec. 1
NOTIFICATIONS BY HEADS OF DEPARTMENTS, ETC.
GENERAL  NOTIFICATIONS
Appointment of Official Liquidator for AA. 387, Gobichettipalayam Labour Contract Co-operative Society (LTD).
(Rc No. 2394/2013 Liquidation)
No. VI(1)/142/2022.
"Under section 137 (2) (b) of Tamil Nadu Co-operative Societies Act 1983, AA. 387 Gobichettipalayam Labour 
Contract Co-operative society (LTD) was liquidated and the Co-operative Sub Registrar / Credit and Marketing, Office 
of the Deputy Registrar of Co-operative Societies, Gobichettipalayam circle was appointed as official Liquidator for the 
above society vide, "Deputy Registrar of Co-operative Societies, Gobichettipalayam circle R.C. No. 5157/2013/Pa dated 
02-05-2013.
Erode-638 452,	
P. KANDARAJA,
3rd March 2022.	
Deputy Registrar of Co-operative Societies,
	
   Gobichettipalayam Circle.
JUDICIAL NOTIFICATIONS
Destruction of Records in the Office of the City Civil Court, Chennai.
(D.No. 2457/2022/R.K.I)
No. VI(1)/143/2022.
 It is hereby notified for the information of parties and witnesses that under the rule for the destruction of Part-I 
records framed by High Court of Judicature at Madras under V of 1917, printed at pages 311 to 317 of the volume I 
of the Civil Rules of Practice and cirular order, all documents produced by them and filed as exhibits in the Original 
Suits and connected appeals, original petitions and Applications in the City Civil Court at Chennai mentioned in the 
schedule hereto and all other documents which have been tendered but either have not been taken or rejected in the 
original Suits. Application and Original Petitions mentioned in the said schedule be destroyed after thirty days from the 
date of publication.
List of Part-I Records to be Destroyed Record Destruction Register of Original Suits for the Year 2001 in 
the City Civil Court, Chennai-104

  135
Constitution of a Sub Court at Ambur in Vellore District.
(Roc. No. 93169/A/2016/Judn)
No. VI(1)/144/2022.
 In exercise of the powers conferred under the first proviso to Section 13 of the Tamil Nadu Civil Courts Act, 
1873 (Central Act III of 1873), the High Court, Madras hereby directs that appeals from the decrees or orders of the 
Principal District Munsif Court, Ambur and Additional District Munsif-cum-Judicial Magistrate Court, Ambur be preferred in 
the Court of Subordinate Judge at Ambur with effect from the date on which the Subordinate Judge, Ambur assumes 
charge of that Court.
High Court, Madras,	
P. DHANABAL,
21st March 2022.	
Registrar General, 
Conferment of Magisterial Powers.
(Roc. No. 31590/2022/B7)
No. VI(1)/145/2022.
No.56/2022.—In exercise of the powers conferred under Section 13 of the Criminal Procedure Code 1973 (Central Act 
2 of 1974), the High Court hereby appoints the following (i) 5 Deputy Tahsildars in Tenkasi District (ii) 8 Tahsildars 
in Krishnagiri District and (iii) 2 Tahsildars in Kancheepuram District, to undergo Magisterial Training for a period 
of 120 days, from the date of assumption of charge and confers upon them the ordinary powers conferable under 
this Code on a Judicial Magistrate to try such cases which were earlier triable and dealt with by an erstwhile Judicial 
Second Class Magistrate.

Variation to the Approved Master Plan of the Madurai Local Planning Area.
(Roc. No. 3821/2019/Mathi 2)
No. VI(1)/146/2022.
In exercise of the powers conferred under sub-section (4) of Section 32 of the Tamil Nadu Town and Country Planning 
Act, 1971 (Tamil Nadu Act 35 of 1972), the Governor of Tamil Nadu hereby makes the following variations to the approved 
Master Plan of the Madurai Local Planning Area under the said Act and issued in G.O.Ms. No.122 Housing and Urban 
Development UD4, Department dated 06.02.1995 and Published in the Tamil Nadu Government Gazette No.7,  Part II-Section 2, 
Page 190-191 dated 22.02.1995.
Variation
In the approved Madurai master Plan under the heading permitted land use in various S.F.No of Madurai Local Planning 
Area, Madurai District, Madurai East Taluk. Village no.86 page no.202, 203 in Thamaraipatty Panchayat, Madurai East 
Panchayat Union, Thamaraipatty Bit 2 Village, S.F.No. 126/1, 126/2, 126/3, 126/10, 128/ 1A, 128/2A, 128/2B1, 128/4 and 
129/3A the following entries should be made.
Under the heading VI. Institutional use zone the following Thamaraipatty Bit 2 Village S.F.Nos: 126/1, 126/2, 126/3, 
126/10, 128/lA, 128/2A, 128/2B1, 128/4 and 129/3A shall be added
Under the heading VI. Agricultural use zone the following Thamaraipatty Bit 2 Village, S.F.Nos: 126/ 1, 126/2, 126/3, 
126/10, 128/lA, 128/2A, 128/2B1, 128/4 shall be deleted.
Under the heading (b). Mixed	Residential use zone the	 following Thamaraipatty Bit 2 Village, S.F.Nos: 129/3A shall be 
deleted.
Madurai,

In exercise of the powers conferred under sub-section (4) of Section 32 of Tamil Nadu Town and Country Planning 
Act 1971 ( Tamil Nadu Act 35 of 1972) and exercise of powers confirmed by the G.O.Ms.No.94 Housing and Urban 
Development (UD4(1) Department dated 12.6.2009 which has been published in the Tamil Nadu Government Gazette No.27, 
Part II-section 2, dated 15.07.2009

[UD4(2)] Department dated 09.03.2022. The following variations are made to the Master Plan of Approved Thanjavur Local 
Planning Authority under the said act and published in the G.O.Ms.No.696 Housing and Urban Development [UDIV(2)] dated 
09.08.1995 and Notification No.39, Part -VI-Section -2, in Page No:879 of the Tamil Nadu Government Gazette dated the 
11th October1995.

from the expression 232pt.

Variation to the Review Approved Coimbatore Master Plan for the Coimbatore Local Planning Area
(Roc No. 742/2021/LPA)
No. VI(1)/149/2021.
In Exercise of powers conferred under sub section (4) of the Section 32 of Tamil Nadu Town and Country Planning Act, 
1971 (Tamil Nadu Act 35 of 1972) and exercise of powers confirmed by the G.O.Ms.No. 94 Housing and Urban Development 
(4-1) Department dated 12.06.2009 which has been published in Tamil Government Gazette No. 27 Part II Section 2 dated 
15.07.2009.
Land use zone conversion from Agricultural use zone into Residential use zone 	 ordered in G.O.(2D)No.09 Housing 
and Urban Development {UD4(L.Re-1)} Department 	dated 13.01.2022 the following variation are made to the Master Plan 
of  Approved / Coimbatore Local Planning Authority under the said act and published in the G.O.Ms.No. 661 Housing and 
Urban Development [UD4(1)] dated 12.10.1994 notification No II(2)/HOU/4377/94 at Page No 1078 of Part-II Section-2 of the 
Tamil Nadu Government Gazette dated 09.11.1994
Variation
In the Approved Coimbatore Master Plan, under the heading permitted land use in various survey numbers of COIMBATORE 
Local Planning Area under heading in Village Chinnavedampatti under the sub heading, Chinnavedampatti D.D.plan No.6 in 
Page No.282, for the following S.No. 577/1B2A entry should be made. 
Under the heading Residential use zone, the expression S.F.No. 577/1B2A shall be added after the entry S.F.No.541 part. 
Under the heading Agricultural use zone, the Expression S.F.No 575 to 577 shall be deleted and the expression, 575, 
576, 577pt (except 577/1B2A) shall be substituted.
